title: bathmium trifoliatum
intro: Bathmium trifoliatum, also known as the "Butterfly Clover", is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bathmium trifoliatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Bathmium trifoliatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
